final:
module top_module(
   input [31:0]RD1_out,
	input [31:0]ALUOutM,
	input [31:0]ResultW,
   input [1:0]ForwardAE,
	output [31:0]SrcAE
);assign SrcAE = (ForwardAE==2'd0)?RD1_out:(ForwardAE==2'd1)?ResultW:ALUOutM;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (ForwardAE == 2'd2) begin
        SrcAE <= RD1_out;
      end else if (ForwardAE == 2'd3) begin
        SrcAE <= ResultW;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
